use_cases.name: Order Status Inquiry
use_cases.description: Customer asks about the current status of their order.
use_cases.default_routing: IVR lookup → Agent escalation if needed

use_cases.name: Return Request
use_cases.description: Customer wants to return an item and receive instructions or a refund.
use_cases.default_routing: Self-service IVA → Agent support if exception

use_cases.name: Promotional Notification
use_cases.description: Send marketing messages to opted-in customers.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated campaign → Multi-channel delivery

use_cases.name: Order Update Notification
use_cases.description: Notify customers of shipment or order changes via email/SMS.
use_cases.default_routing: Integration with order system → SMS/email push

use_cases.name: Bill Inquiry
use_cases.description: Customer asks for details about their current bill or invoice.
use_cases.default_routing: Self-service IVA → Agent escalation for complex questions

use_cases.name: Payment Processing
use_cases.description: Customer wants to make a payment or check payment status.
use_cases.default_routing: Payment portal automation → Agent support for exceptions

use_cases.name: New Appointment Booking
use_cases.description: Customer schedules a new appointment through any channel.
use_cases.default_routing: Calendar integration → Confirm booking → Reminder setup

use_cases.name: Reschedule Appointment
use_cases.description: Customer changes the date/time of an existing appointment.
use_cases.default_routing: Verify existing appointment → Update calendar → Notify customer

use_cases.name: Troubleshoot Connectivity Issue
use_cases.description: Customer reports internet/network problems.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated troubleshooting steps → Escalation to Tier 2 support

use_cases.name: Software Issue Resolution
use_cases.description: Customer reports a software malfunction or error.
use_cases.default_routing: Knowledge base self-service → Agent escalation if unresolved

use_cases.name: Account Creation
use_cases.description: Customer creates a new account with secure verification.
use_cases.default_routing: Self-service portal → Verification process

use_cases.name: Password Reset
use_cases.description: Customer resets forgotten or compromised password.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated password reset → Security verification if needed

use_cases.name: Track Shipment
use_cases.description: Customer checks the status of a shipment.
use_cases.default_routing: Integration with logistics → Agent fallback

use_cases.name: Cancel or Change Order
use_cases.description: Customer requests order modification or cancellation.
use_cases.default_routing: Order system check → IVR/Agent routing

use_cases.name: Prescription Refill Request
use_cases.description: Patient requests a refill for a prescription.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated refill → Pharmacy confirmation

use_cases.name: Insurance Verification
use_cases.description: Verify patient insurance before appointment or service.
use_cases.default_routing: Integration with insurance database → Agent confirmation

use_cases.name: Account Balance Inquiry
use_cases.description: Customer checks current account balances and recent transactions.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated self-service → Agent escalation if anomalies

use_cases.name: Loan Application Support
use_cases.description: Assist customers with loan application questions and submission.
use_cases.default_routing: Self-service FAQ → Agent review for exceptions

use_cases.name: Lead Capture
use_cases.description: Collect and qualify new sales leads from website or campaigns.
use_cases.default_routing: CRM integration → Sales rep assignment

use_cases.name: Quote Generation
use_cases.description: Generate and send pricing quotes to potential customers.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated quote engine → Sales rep confirmation

use_cases.name: Login Verification
use_cases.description: Customer verifies identity during login or suspicious activity.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated verification → Agent escalation for failures

use_cases.name: Password Reset
use_cases.description: Customer requests password reset securely.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated reset portal → MFA confirmation

use_cases.name: Check Order Status
use_cases.description: Customer asks for detailed status of a placed order.
use_cases.default_routing: Order system lookup → Agent fallback

use_cases.name: Order Detail Inquiry
use_cases.description: Customer wants full order details including items and delivery estimates.
use_cases.default_routing: Integration with fulfillment system → Agent assistance for exceptions

use_cases.name: Initiate Return
use_cases.description: Customer starts the process to return an item.
use_cases.default_routing: Self-service portal → Agent if exceptions

use_cases.name: Exchange Item
use_cases.description: Customer requests to exchange an item for another.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated exchange → Agent approval for special cases

use_cases.name: Shipping Notification
use_cases.description: Notify customers when an order has shipped.
use_cases.default_routing: Order system → Automated email/SMS

use_cases.name: Delivery Update
use_cases.description: Send updates if there are delays or changes in delivery.
use_cases.default_routing: Order management integration → Automated notifications

use_cases.name: Campaign Message
use_cases.description: Send promotional messages to opted-in customers.
use_cases.default_routing: Campaign scheduler → Multi-channel delivery

use_cases.name: Targeted Offer
use_cases.description: Send promotions based on customer behavior or loyalty tier.
use_cases.default_routing: CRM data → Automated message delivery

use_cases.name: Billing Question
use_cases.description: Customer asks about charges or statements.
use_cases.default_routing: Billing system lookup → Agent escalation if needed

use_cases.name: Dispute Resolution
use_cases.description: Customer disputes a charge and seeks resolution.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated dispute intake → Agent resolution

use_cases.name: Refund Request
use_cases.description: Customer requests a refund for a purchase.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated refund approval → Agent confirmation

use_cases.name: Refund Status Check
use_cases.description: Customer checks status of an ongoing refund.
use_cases.default_routing: System lookup → Automated update

use_cases.name: Check Points Balance
use_cases.description: Customer wants to see current loyalty points.
use_cases.default_routing: Self-service portal → Agent fallback

use_cases.name: Redeem Points
use_cases.description: Customer redeems points for rewards or discounts.
use_cases.default_routing: Automated redemption → Confirmation sent to customer
